text:
is a book published by Ohta Publishing on 01 March 1997.

Overview

The book is divided into three separate parts. The first is a lengthy interview with Hideaki Anno conducted by Mitsunari Oizumi. They discuss various topics, including the connection between Neon Genesis Evangelion and , the influence of ' and on Anno, a look at the studio GAINAX, and a glowing review of the first episode of '. The second part is a collection of interviews with members of GAINAX. They discuss how they met Anno and share their thoughts on working with him. The speakers are Yoshiyuki Sadamoto, Masayuki, Hiroki Sato, Toshimichi Ōtsuki, and Kazuya Tsurumaki. Finally, the book concludes with an essay written by Oizumi on the character Rei Ayanami.
